subject: [PATCH] blkcg: update iocost_coef_gen.py to use io_uring

reviews.author: Tejun Heo
reviews.summary: Acknowledged the patch without any objections or suggestions.
reviews.raw_body:
On Wed, Jun 24, 2026 at 10:50:34AM -0400, Jeff Layton wrote:
> Recently I found myself having to benchmark some rather fast disks for
> iocost, but the old iocost_coef_gen.py script couldn't generate enough
> throughput to saturate it. Make it use io_uring instead.
> 
> Cc: Tejun Heo <tj@kernel.org>
> Cc: linux-block@vger.kernel.org
> Signed-off-by: Jeff Layton <jlayton@kernel.org>

Acked-by: Tejun Heo <tj@kernel.org>

Thanks.

-- 
tejun

2026-06-24.patch_summary: This patch updates the iocost_coef_gen.py script to use io_uring instead of libaio for benchmarking fast disks, allowing it to generate enough throughput to saturate the disk.
